title: Delete Operation for Two Strings
titleCn: 两个字符串的删除操作

testcases.input: word1 = "sea", word2 = "eat" Output: 2 Explanation: You need one step to make "sea" to "ea" and another step to make "eat" to "ea".
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: You need one step to make "sea" to "ea" and another step to make "eat" to "ea".
